task_completion.description: Navigate to the Picklist Dependency settings for the Leads module
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Vtiger CRM Settings page for 'Picklist Dependency' is visible, and the 'Leads' module is selected in the module dropdown.

task_completion.description: Select Industry as the source field and Lead Source as the target field
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the new Picklist Dependency setup screen, the 'Source Field' is set to 'Industry' and the 'Target Field' is set to 'Lead Source'.

task_completion.description: Map the Education industry to the correct lead sources
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the dependency mapping matrix, under the 'Education' source value column, exactly three target values are selected/highlighted: 'Cold Call', 'Public Relations', and 'Word of mouth'.

task_completion.description: Map the Technology industry to the correct lead sources
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the dependency mapping matrix, under the 'Technology' source value column, exactly three target values are selected/highlighted: 'Trade Show', 'Partner', and 'Web Site'.
A success message is displayed or the Picklist Dependency list view shows the newly created dependency between 'Industry' and 'Lead Source' for the 'Leads' module.

integrity.description: The agent used the web browser to configure the CRM
integrity.visual_evidence: The configuration is performed entirely within a web browser displaying the Vtiger CRM interface.

integrity.description: The agent did not use direct database manipulation to bypass the UI
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows running MySQL commands or database administration tools (like phpMyAdmin) are used to insert the dependency rules.

integrity.description: The configuration screens are genuine Vtiger CRM UI elements
integrity.visual_evidence: The mapping matrix, dropdowns, and save buttons match the standard Vtiger CRM user interface, rather than being typed into a text editor or script.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The Picklist Dependency must be configured for the 'Leads' module with 'Industry' as the source field and 'Lead Source' as the target field. The required mappings are: 1) 'Education' mapped exactly to 'Cold Call', 'Public Relations', and 'Word of mouth'. 2) 'Technology' mapped exactly to 'Trade Show', 'Partner', and 'Web Site'.
